description: Audit and connect disconnected settings - Wire up store settings that are saved but not enforced anywhere in the app (googleMapsUrl, instagramUrl, facebookUrl, serviceablePincodes, storeOpenTime/storeCloseTime). The isStoreOpen + time check IS already connected (isStoreCurrentlyOpen is called in checkout routes). deliveryEstimateMin/Max IS connected (used in checkout-form.tsx and order-checkout.ts). deliveryFee/freeDeliveryThreshold IS connected. serviceablePincodes is NOT enforced (isServiceablePincode always returns true). Social URLs are NOT displayed anywhere in the customer-facing app.
steps: Create a store footer/info component that displays social links (instagramUrl, facebookUrl) and googleMapsUrl from store settings. Add it to the customer-facing layout or the account page. Use lucide-react icons (Instagram-like icon via 'Instagram' export, or use a generic link icon for Facebook/Maps). Only render each link if the URL is non-empty. Place it at the bottom of the main customer layout or in the /account page where store info is relevant.

For serviceablePincodes: the admin settings UI already labels it 'for reference only' and the isServiceablePincode function always returns true (GPS distance is primary). Document this clearly by adding a comment to the admin settings form input: 'Reference only - delivery is validated by GPS distance'. No code change needed for enforcement since this is intentional.

The storeOpenTime/storeCloseTime are already wired up through isStoreCurrentlyOpen() which is called in both app/api/orders/route.ts and app/api/mobile/v1/orders/route.ts. These are NOT disconnected. Document this finding.

Wire up the social/maps URLs: create a simple StoreInfoLinks component in components/ui/store-info-links.tsx that accepts the store settings and renders clickable icon links for non-empty social/maps URLs. Import and use it in the customer account page (app/account/page.tsx) or a suitable customer-facing location.
acceptance_criteria: googleMapsUrl, instagramUrl, facebookUrl are displayed in a customer-facing location when non-empty
serviceablePincodes admin field has clarifying text that it is reference-only
No existing checkout/order flow is broken
